# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Community Contribution Test

on:
  pull_request_target:

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v2
        with:
          java-version: 17

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: maven install

      - name: Run tests
        run: maven test

      - name: Post results
        uses: actions/github-script@v6
        with:
          script: |
            const report = require('./target/surefire-reports/TEST-*.xml');
            github.issues.createComment({
              issue_number: context.issue.number,
              body: `Test results: ${report.tests} tests, ${report.failures} failures`
            });
